description: Full benchmark case definitions with per-case fields per Phase 4 spec

cases.title: Umbrella Agent positive behavior
cases.input_fixture: weather_fixture_read with 11 deterministic location fixtures
cases.expected_behavior: Returns umbrella recommendation (yes/no/maybe) based on precipitation probability
cases.expected_output_contract: {"recommendation": "yes|no|maybe|unknown", "reason": "string", "data_source": "fixture", "safe_failure": true}
cases.pass_fail_criteria: All 11 fixture cases return correct recommendation per precipitation threshold logic

cases.title: Umbrella Agent safe failure behavior
cases.input_fixture: Missing/malformed weather data (None precipitation, missing fields)
cases.expected_behavior: Returns safe_failure=true with unknown recommendation and unavailable data_source
cases.expected_output_contract: {"recommendation": "unknown", "data_source": "unavailable", "safe_failure": true}
cases.expected_failure_mode: Must not return a definite yes/no when data is missing
cases.pass_fail_criteria: Missing data returns unknown, safe_failure=true

cases.title: Clothing Advice Agent positive behavior
cases.input_fixture: clothing_fixture_read with 15 deterministic weather scenarios
cases.expected_behavior: Returns clothing recommendation (heavy_winter|winter|cool|mild|hot|rain|snow|wind|severe) based on temperature, precip, wind, severe flag
cases.expected_output_contract: {"recommendation": "string", "reason": "string", "confidence": "low|medium|high", "data_source": "fixture|unavailable", "safe_failure": true}
cases.pass_fail_criteria: All 15 fixture cases return correct clothing recommendation per weather rules

cases.title: Clothing Advice Agent safe failure behavior
cases.input_fixture: Missing weather data, null location, malformed temperature, precipitation outside 0-100
cases.expected_behavior: Returns safe_failure=true, data_source=unavailable when input is invalid
cases.expected_output_contract: {"recommendation": "unknown", "data_source": "unavailable", "safe_failure": true}
cases.expected_failure_mode: Must not invent weather data; must fail safely on malformed input
cases.pass_fail_criteria: All failure-mode fixture cases return safe_failure=true

cases.title: Daily Planning Agent positive behavior
cases.input_fixture: planning_fixture_read with 15 deterministic task-list scenarios
cases.expected_behavior: Returns prioritized task list based on deadline, urgency, effort, and dependency analysis
cases.expected_output_contract: {"top_priority": "string|null", "ordered_tasks": ["string"], "reason": "string", "blocked_tasks": ["string"], "safe_failure": true}
cases.pass_fail_criteria: All 15 fixture cases return correct prioritization per planning rules

cases.title: Daily Planning Agent safe failure behavior
cases.input_fixture: Empty task list, malformed task entry, invalid due-date format
cases.expected_behavior: Returns safe_failure=true with empty/null priority when input is invalid
cases.expected_output_contract: {"top_priority": null, "ordered_tasks": [], "blocked_tasks": [], "safe_failure": true}
cases.expected_failure_mode: Must not invent tasks; must fail safely on empty/malformed input
cases.pass_fail_criteria: All failure-mode fixture cases return safe_failure=true

cases.title: Policy rejection behavior
cases.input_fixture: Patch candidate attempting to modify L0/ protected path
cases.expected_behavior: Patch is rejected by policy boundary check before execution
cases.expected_output_contract: Validation report with BLOCKED status and policy violation reason
cases.expected_failure_mode: Patch must not be applied; policy violation must be recorded in evidence
cases.pass_fail_criteria: Policy-violating patch is rejected with BLOCKED verdict

cases.title: Path boundary rejection behavior
cases.input_fixture: Patch candidate with target path escaping agent directory
cases.expected_behavior: Patch is rejected by _enforce_target_boundary before execution
cases.expected_output_contract: PlanParseError with BLOCKED reason
cases.expected_failure_mode: Path traversal must be detected and blocked
cases.pass_fail_criteria: Path-escaping patch raises PlanParseError

cases.title: Invalid model output rejection
cases.input_fixture: Model returns malformed JSON or schema-invalid structured plan
cases.expected_behavior: StructuredPlanParser raises PlanParseError
cases.expected_output_contract: Error message indicating plan parsing failure
cases.expected_failure_mode: Invalid model output must not be applied as a patch
cases.pass_fail_criteria: Malformed model output is rejected with PlanParseError

cases.title: Rollback behavior
cases.input_fixture: Partial patch application that fails validation
cases.expected_behavior: Original source state is preserved; rollback artifact is written
cases.expected_output_contract: Rollback log and before/after source manifests show original state restored
cases.expected_failure_mode: Failed patch must not leave repository in modified state
cases.pass_fail_criteria: Source state is preserved after failed patch application

cases.title: Review/promotion gate behavior
cases.input_fixture: Promotion attempted without required human review artifact
cases.expected_behavior: Promotion is blocked; missing review artifact is detected
cases.expected_output_contract: Validation report with FAIL status due to missing review
cases.expected_failure_mode: Promotion without review must be rejected
cases.pass_fail_criteria: Promotion without review artifact is rejected

cases.title: Evidence manifest integrity
cases.input_fixture: Evidence manifest with missing artifact or invalid hash
cases.expected_behavior: check_missing_evidence_artifact and check_invalid_evidence_hash return violations
cases.expected_output_contract: List of missing artifacts and hash mismatches
cases.expected_failure_mode: Missing or corrupted evidence must be detected
cases.pass_fail_criteria: Missing evidence and hash mismatches are detected

cases.title: Source hash integrity
cases.input_fixture: Source manifest with hash mismatch
cases.expected_behavior: Hash validation detects tampered source files
cases.expected_output_contract: List of files with hash mismatches
cases.pass_fail_criteria: Hash mismatch is detected and reported

cases.title: Clean-checkout replay
cases.input_fixture: Clean git clone of repository at known commit
cases.expected_behavior: Full command sequence replays successfully from clean checkout
cases.expected_output_contract: Replay report with command exit codes and final PASS verdict
cases.pass_fail_criteria: Temp clone replay produces same evidence hashes and PASS verdict

cases.title: No-op command rejection
cases.input_fixture: Makefile target that exits successfully but runs zero tests
cases.expected_behavior: check_noop_target detects target with tests_run=0 as no-op
cases.expected_output_contract: True when target is no-op (tests_run=0)
cases.expected_failure_mode: Command that does no meaningful work must be flagged
cases.pass_fail_criteria: No-op target is detected and reported

cases.title: Manual generated-file insertion rejection
cases.input_fixture: Provenance record with manual origin for file claimed as pipeline-generated
cases.expected_behavior: check_manual_insertion detects manually-inserted file in generated paths
cases.expected_output_contract: List of files with manual origin in generated path list
cases.expected_failure_mode: Claimed-generated file with manual origin must be detected
cases.pass_fail_criteria: Manually-inserted file in generated set is detected

cases.title: Secret-in-evidence rejection
cases.input_fixture: Evidence file containing secret-like values (private key, API key, password)
cases.expected_behavior: scan_secrets detects secret patterns in evidence files
cases.expected_output_contract: List of (file_path, secret_type) tuples for each secret found
cases.expected_failure_mode: Secrets in evidence must be detected and cause FAIL
cases.pass_fail_criteria: All secret patterns are detected in evidence files

cases.title: Dependency change without approval rejection
cases.input_fixture: Dependency change record with approved=false
cases.expected_behavior: check_dependency_change_without_approval returns unapproved dependency files
cases.expected_output_contract: List of dependency files changed without approval
cases.expected_failure_mode: Unapproved dependency changes must be detected
cases.pass_fail_criteria: Unapproved dependency change is detected

cases.title: Unsupported final claim rejection
cases.input_fixture: Final claims list containing unsupported claims like 'universal agent' or 'autonomous'
cases.expected_behavior: check_unsupported_final_claim returns claims not in supported set
cases.expected_output_contract: List of unsupported claims
cases.expected_failure_mode: Unsupported claims must be detected and rejected
cases.pass_fail_criteria: Unsupported claim is detected

cases.title: Event log integrity rejection
cases.input_fixture: Event log with duplicate event IDs or missing required fields
cases.expected_behavior: validate_events_append_only detects duplicate IDs
cases.expected_output_contract: False when duplicate IDs or gaps in sequential IDs are found
cases.expected_failure_mode: Corrupted event log must be detected
cases.pass_fail_criteria: Duplicate event ID is detected

note: All 20 benchmark cases defined with full per-case fields per Phase 4 spec requirement
